violations.text: Parts of the floor in the bar area and kitchen area are constructed of unsealed concrete, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Approved material list was provided to PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026

The walls by the 3-bay sink and hand sink are constructed of brick. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Per PIC, FRP will be put behind the 3-bay sink and hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
